political.s: 7-Eleven operates a corporate PAC (C00549717 per FEC) and has historically donated to both parties, with stated intent to support politicians 'on both sides of the aisle' who back small business and retail interests. In the 2019–2020 cycle, the PAC contributed approximately $20,000 to federal candidates. The company has also invested in federal lobbying, spending six figures annually on issues like food labeling, tobacco, and payment processing.

charity.s: 7-Eleven is a long-standing partner of Children's Miracle Network Hospitals, raising more than $17 million in 2024 to support 112 local member hospitals, and over $200 million since 1991. The company also partners with Feeding America and runs the Operation Chill program, which donates Slurpee coupons to law enforcement agencies to build community relations.
charity.focus: Children's health (CMN Hospitals), hunger relief (Feeding America), community policing

environment.s: 7-Eleven has set a goal to reduce CO2 equivalent emissions from stores by 50% by 2030 (vs. 2013 baseline), having already exceeded an earlier 20% reduction target eight years ahead of schedule. The company is expanding its 7Charge EV charging network (180 ports at 53 stores as of end-2024) and is working to reduce plastic packaging. However, as a large convenience retailer with thousands of fuel-selling locations, its overall environmental footprint remains substantial.

labor.s: Glassdoor reviews (3.4/5 overall, 3.0/5 for compensation) reflect recurring complaints about low pay relative to workload, understaffing, and inconsistent franchise-level management. In August 2024, OSHA cited a leading convenience store chain (identified in OSHA news releases as 7-Eleven) for a serious violation following a cashier being shot during a robbery in Orlando. Recent corporate employee reviews also note the elimination of 401k matching and denial of merit increases in 2025, pointing to benefit reductions amid financial pressures.

dei.s: 7-Eleven's parent company Seven & i Holdings maintains formal DEI programs including diversity training, unconscious bias education, and disability employment initiatives. The company has a Chief Diversity Officer and publicly states its franchise model is built on empowering entrepreneurs 'regardless of race, gender, or background.' No specific HRC CEI score for 7-Eleven Inc. was publicly available, though the parent company adopted same-sex partner benefits parity in 2024.

animals.s: 7-Eleven is a convenience retailer and does not manufacture cosmetics or pharmaceuticals, so animal testing policies are not applicable to its core business operations. The company does sell a wide range of third-party food and consumer products whose animal welfare implications vary by supplier.

guns.s: 7-Eleven does not sell or manufacture firearms. As a convenience store chain, its product assortment focuses on food, beverages, tobacco, and everyday consumer goods. No corporate policy on firearms sales was publicly stated, as it is not part of their retail offering.

privacy.s: 7-Eleven collects extensive personal data through its 7Rewards loyalty program, 7NOW delivery app, and in-store technologies including geolocation, purchase history, behavioral tracking, and audio recordings. The company states it does not sell personal information for cash, but its privacy policy acknowledges sharing data with advertising partners in ways that may constitute a 'sale' under California law (CCPA). Third-party ad targeting and behavioral profiling are standard practices across its digital platforms.

execPay.s: CEO Joseph DePinto earned approximately $29.6 million in fiscal 2024 (down from $52 million in 2023), with over 90% of compensation being performance-based per parent company Seven & i Holdings. Store-level workers, meanwhile, earn near minimum wage with Glassdoor reviews citing compensation rated 3.0/5 and recurring complaints about low pay relative to workload. The formal CEO-to-worker pay ratio is not publicly disclosed as 7-Eleven is a private subsidiary.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
